$schema: Protocols to track for DeFi deployment (Phase 5). slug is the DeFiLlama /protocol/{slug} slug; label is the display name; symbols optionally restricts which LST symbols to read from chainTvls.Solana.tokens (empty/omitted = all tracked LSTs). The pipeline never writes here. Verify each slug against https://api.llama.fi/protocols before relying on it.
